Document:
# Rule 4: ERP Roleplay intended to provoke a sexual reaction from other players — including writing erotic fanfiction or sharing links to adult content — is strictly prohibited. Such actions will almost always result in a permanent ban from the server.
Administrators reserve the right to evaluate each situation individually in order to determine whether a specific action is a violation of this rule or constitutes erotic content. Punishment is based on context and intent, not on isolated words. Occasional use of profanity in-character is not considered a violation.
If you are unsure whether your words or actions are acceptable, ask in AHelp first.
